subject: docs: finalize SESSION_NOTES + test counts after full branch audit
body:
Rewrites SESSION_NOTES to capture the full arc of the branch (structural
+ correctness + API + presentation + housekeeping phases), not just the
most recent task. Updates CLAUDE.md and TESTING_GUIDE test counts to
the final 88/88 (43 formatting + 9 Supabase integration + 31 debug-log
+ 5 DebugRootBoundary).
